hints: Tiempo: si hubiera sabido del defecto antes
hintDisplay: Sujeto: la cliente / Verbo: devolver (would have returned) / Complemento: el vestido defectuoso / Tiempo: si hubiera sabido del defecto antes
spanishSentence: Si la cliente hubiera sabido del defecto antes, habría devuelto el vestido defectuoso a la tienda.
correctSentence: If the customer had known about the defect earlier, she would have returned the defective dress to the store.

hints: Complemento: ese abrigo de diseñador el año pasado
hintDisplay: Sujeto: yo / Verbo: comprar (pasado perfecto → presente) / Complemento: ese abrigo de diseñador el año pasado
spanishSentence: Si no hubiera comprado ese abrigo de diseñador el año pasado, tendría más dinero ahora.
correctSentence: If I had not bought that designer coat last year, I would have more money now.

correctSentence: If my friend had not gone shopping yesterday, he would have more money now.

correctSentence: If I had not picked more expensive clothing at the store, I would have more money now.

correctSentence: If Anna had not bought those expensive shoes, she would have more money now.

correctSentence: If Marcus had not spent so much money last month, he would be comparing prices more carefully now.
